qa_pair.question: Search Notion for any page or database. How many results are returned and what is the type of the first result?
qa_pair.answer: Varies by user - should return count and type (page or database)
qa_pair.verification: Check that response includes count and items with type field

qa_pair.question: Create a new page in Notion titled "MCP Test Page" with the content "This is a test page created by the productivity MCP server." What is the URL of the created page?
qa_pair.verification: URL should be valid notion.so link

qa_pair.question: Query a Notion database and list the first 5 items. What properties does each item have?
qa_pair.verification: Each item should have id, url, title, and properties

qa_pair.question: List your GitHub repositories sorted by most recently updated. What is the name and star count of your most recently updated repo?
qa_pair.answer: Returns repo name and stars count
qa_pair.verification: Should return valid repo with name, stars, and updated_at

qa_pair.question: Get details about a specific GitHub repository you own. What is the default branch and how many open issues does it have?
qa_pair.answer: Returns default_branch (usually main/master) and open_issues count

qa_pair.question: List open issues in one of your repositories. How many open issues are there and what are their titles?
qa_pair.answer: Returns count and list of issue titles
qa_pair.verification: Each issue should have number, title, state, labels

qa_pair.question: List open pull requests in one of your repositories. Are there any open PRs, and if so, what branches are they merging?
qa_pair.answer: Returns PR count and branch info (head -> base)
qa_pair.verification: PRs should show head.ref and base.ref

qa_pair.question: Send a test message to Discord that says "Hello from Productivity MCP Server!" What message ID is returned?
qa_pair.verification: Message should appear in Discord channel, ID returned

qa_pair.question: Send a Discord embed with title "Test Notification", description "This is a test embed", and color blue (5814783). What message ID is returned?
qa_pair.verification: Embed should appear in Discord with correct formatting

qa_pair.question: Delete a Discord message using the message ID from a previous send operation. Was the deletion successful?
qa_pair.verification: Message should no longer appear in Discord channel
